name_cn:
🔥Premium Factory Leather🔥
Y's 2024 New Rose Style Mini Gaby Saint Laurent 2024 New Mini Gaby Handbag Double zipper design for easy opening, large compartment to hold phone, small wallet and card holder, detachable adjustable shoulder strap, can be used as a makeup bag or easily crossbody. Top features a handle, can be used as a handbag Rose Style~
Model: 766731
Size: 18×11×6.5 cm
